query:
UPDATE research_reports SET source_url = CASE
  WHEN source = 'Gartner' THEN 'https://www.gartner.com/en/newsroom'
  WHEN source = 'CB Insights' THEN 'https://www.cbinsights.com/research'
  WHEN source = 'Statista' THEN 'https://www.statista.com'
  WHEN source = 'McKinsey Global Institute' THEN 'https://www.mckinsey.com/mgi/overview'
  WHEN source = 'McKinsey' THEN 'https://www.mckinsey.com/featured-insights'
  WHEN source = 'Dealroom' THEN 'https://dealroom.co/blog'
  WHEN source = 'PitchBook' THEN 'https://pitchbook.com/news/reports'
  WHEN source = 'Crunchbase' THEN 'https://news.crunchbase.com'
  WHEN source = 'KPMG Venture Pulse' THEN 'https://kpmg.com/xx/en/home/campaigns/venture-pulse.html'
  WHEN source = 'EY Startup Barometer' THEN 'https://www.ey.com/en_gl/entrepreneurship'
  WHEN source = 'Atomico State of European Tech' THEN 'https://stateofeuropeantech.com'
  WHEN source = 'Atomico' THEN 'https://stateofeuropeantech.com'
  WHEN source = 'Boston Consulting Group' THEN 'https://www.bcg.com/publications'
  WHEN source = 'Sequoia Capital' THEN 'https://www.sequoiacap.com/article'
  WHEN source LIKE '%a16z%' THEN 'https://a16z.com/content'
  WHEN source = 'World Economic Forum' THEN 'https://www.weforum.org/publications'
  WHEN source = 'OECD' THEN 'https://www.oecd.org/en/publications.html'
  WHEN source = 'European Investment Fund' THEN 'https://www.eif.org/news_centre/publications'
  WHEN source = 'Bain & Company' THEN 'https://www.bain.com/insights'
  WHEN source LIKE '%Forrester%' THEN 'https://www.forrester.com/research'
  WHEN source = 'IDC' THEN 'https://www.idc.com/research'
  WHEN source LIKE '%Bloomberg%' THEN 'https://www.bloomberg.com/professional/solution/bloomberg-intelligence'
  WHEN source = 'Grand View Research' THEN 'https://www.grandviewresearch.com'
  WHEN source = 'MarketsandMarkets' THEN 'https://www.marketsandmarkets.com'
  ELSE CONCAT('https://www.google.com/search?q=', REPLACE(source, ' ', '+'))
END
WHERE source_url IS NULL;
command:
